title: syringa oblata var. giraldii
intro: Syringa oblata var. giraldii, also known as the tree lilac or Chinese lilac, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, belonging to the Oleaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, headache, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Syringa oblata var. giraldii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and aid in the relief of fever and headache. Syringa oblata var. giraldii is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its flowers can be used to make a fragrant oil with potential antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
